article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb 19, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Investment Development Authority

(BIDA) executive chairman Lokman Hossain Miah today said that they were

working to make the One Stop Service (OSS) 100 per cent operational within

three to four months to provide prompt services to the investors.

"Recently, in a meeting I apprised Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina about the

limitations over providing quick services to the investors. Prime minister

asked me to ensure services to the investors like the same i

llm_connections.evidence_quote: improving logistics facilities and human capital, as these were the key factors that influence investors' decision
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links national-level 'improving logistics facilities' to investors' decisions, matching the 'Delivery' feature's focus on logistics performance at the country/sector level.
